checks.name: viewReservation_ceiling
checks.description: viewReservation is only allowed if resource is reachable via viewPermissions, memberPermissions, or admin permissions

checks.name: updateReservation_ceiling
checks.description: updateReservation is only allowed via memberPermissions or admin permissions

checks.name: grantAccessReservation_ceiling
checks.description: grantAccessReservation is only allowed via admin permissions

checks.name: createReservation_ceiling
checks.description: createReservation on a Property is only allowed via memberPermissions or admin permissions, and blocked by renovation unless admin

checks.name: viewProperty_ceiling
checks.description: viewProperty is only allowed via viewPermissions, memberPermissions, or admin permissions

checks.name: updateProperty_ceiling
checks.description: updateProperty is only allowed via memberPermissions or admin permissions

checks.name: grantAccessProperty_ceiling
checks.description: grantAccessProperty is only allowed via admin permissions

checks.name: viewHotel_ceiling
checks.description: viewHotel is only allowed via viewPermissions.hotelReservations, memberPermissions.hotelReservations, or hotelAdminPermissions

checks.name: updateHotel_ceiling
checks.description: updateHotel is only allowed via memberPermissions.hotelReservations or hotelAdminPermissions

checks.name: createProperty_ceiling
checks.description: createProperty on a Hotel is only allowed via memberPermissions.hotelReservations or hotelAdminPermissions

checks.name: createHotel_ceiling
checks.description: createHotel is only allowed via memberPermissions.hotelReservations or hotelAdminPermissions

checks.name: grantAccessHotel_ceiling
checks.description: grantAccessHotel is only allowed via hotelAdminPermissions

checks.name: renovation_forbid_ceiling
checks.description: createReservation must be forbidden on renovating properties for non-admin users

checks.name: floor_viewer_viewReservation
checks.description: Users with viewPermissions for a reservation's hotel MUST be able to view that reservation

checks.name: floor_member_updateReservation
checks.description: Users with memberPermissions for a reservation's hotel MUST be able to update that reservation

checks.name: floor_admin_grantAccessReservation
checks.description: Users with admin permissions for a reservation's hotel MUST be able to grant access on that reservation

checks.name: floor_member_createReservation
checks.description: Members MUST be able to createReservation on non-renovating properties

checks.name: floor_admin_createReservation_renovation
checks.description: Admins MUST be able to createReservation even on renovating properties

checks.name: floor_admin_grantAccessHotel
checks.description: Hotel admins MUST be able to grant access on hotels in their admin set

checks.name: liveness_viewReservation
checks.description: viewReservation is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_updateReservation
checks.description: updateReservation is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_createReservation
checks.description: createReservation is not trivially deny-all

checks.description: grantAccessReservation is not trivially deny-all

checks.description: viewProperty is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_viewHotel
checks.description: viewHotel is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_grantAccessHotel
checks.description: grantAccessHotel is not trivially deny-all

results.description: viewReservation is only allowed if resource is reachable via viewPermissions, memberPermissions, or admin permissions
updateReservation is only allowed via memberPermissions or admin permissions
grantAccessReservation is only allowed via admin permissions
createReservation on a Property is only allowed via memberPermissions or admin permissions, and blocked by renovation unless admin
viewProperty is only allowed via viewPermissions, memberPermissions, or admin permissions
updateProperty is only allowed via memberPermissions or admin permissions
grantAccessProperty is only allowed via admin permissions
viewHotel is only allowed via viewPermissions.hotelReservations, memberPermissions.hotelReservations, or hotelAdminPermissions
updateHotel is only allowed via memberPermissions.hotelReservations or hotelAdminPermissions
createProperty on a Hotel is only allowed via memberPermissions.hotelReservations or hotelAdminPermissions
createHotel is only allowed via memberPermissions.hotelReservations or hotelAdminPermissions
grantAccessHotel is only allowed via hotelAdminPermissions
createReservation must be forbidden on renovating properties for non-admin users
Users with viewPermissions for a reservation's hotel MUST be able to view that reservation
Users with memberPermissions for a reservation's hotel MUST be able to update that reservation
Users with admin permissions for a reservation's hotel MUST be able to grant access on that reservation
Members MUST be able to createReservation on non-renovating properties
Admins MUST be able to createReservation even on renovating properties
results.counterexample:
✗ Policy set 1 implies policy set 2: DOES NOT HOLD
  Counterexample found:
principal: User::"", action: Action::"createReservation", resource: Property::""
context: {}
entities: [
  Action::"viewReservation",
  User::"" {
    hotelAdminPermissions: [Hotel::""],
    memberPermissions: {"hotelReservations": [], "propertyReservations": []},
    propertyAdminPermissions: [Property::""],
    viewPermissions: {"hotelReservations": [], "propertyReservations": [Property::""]},
  },
  Action::"createProperty",
  Action::"updateHotel",
  Action::"grantAccessReservation",
  Action::"viewProperty",
  Action::"updateReservation",
  Action::"createReservation",
  Action::"createHotel",
  Action::"updateProperty",
  Action::"viewHotel",
  Property::"" in [Hotel::""] {
    isUnderRenovation: true,
  },
  Action::"grantAccessProperty",
  Hotel::"",
  Action::"grantAccessHotel",
]

results.description: Hotel admins MUST be able to grant access on hotels in their admin set
viewReservation is not trivially deny-all
updateReservation is not trivially deny-all
createReservation is not trivially deny-all
grantAccessReservation is not trivially deny-all
viewProperty is not trivially deny-all
viewHotel is not trivially deny-all
grantAccessHotel is not trivially deny-all
